---
name: Tool submission
about: Submit a tool or integration that implements the Untitled Protocol
title: "Tool submission: [tool name]"
labels: tool-submission
assignees: ''
---

**Tool name**
<!-- e.g. untitled-meta, UntitlePlugin, MyApp -->

**One-line description**
<!-- What does this tool do? -->

**Type**
<!-- e.g. npm package, WordPress plugin, browser extension, CLI, library -->

**Language / platform**
<!-- e.g. JavaScript, PHP, Python, Ruby, Go -->

**Which states does it support?**
- [ ] `now`
- [ ] `draft`
- [ ] `ephemeral`
- [ ] `anonymous`
- [ ] `collective`
- [ ] `generative`

**Does it read or write the protocol signal?**
- [ ] Reads `<meta name="untitled">` tag
- [ ] Writes `<meta name="untitled">` tag
- [ ] Reads `X-Untitled` HTTP header
- [ ] Writes `X-Untitled` HTTP header
- [ ] Reads/writes `UNTITLED` sidecar files

**Link**
<!-- GitHub repo, npm package URL, plugin page, or hosted URL -->

**Anything else?**
<!-- Optional: notes on edge cases, limitations, or roadmap -->
